title: HTB Devvortex — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox Devvortex writeup. Joomla CVE-2023-23752 info disclosure, authenticated RCE via template injection and apport-cli sudo exploit.

title: Building a Minimal Python C2
description: Educational research on C2 architecture: HTTP beacon over requests, tasking queue, base64 payload delivery and basic operator console.

title: Linux Privilege Escalation Notes
description: Linux privesc quick reference: SUID/SGID, sudo -l, cron wildcards, capabilities, writable /etc/passwd and path hijacking techniques.

title: HTB Usage — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox Usage writeup. Blind SQLi via password reset, Laravel admin panel file upload RCE and wildcard injection in a custom backup binary.

title: Bash Multi-Session Netcat Listener
description: Bash wrapper around netcat for managing multiple reverse shell sessions with logging, session tagging and basic command history per shell.

title: Cobalt Strike Beacon Analysis
description: Analysis of a Cobalt Strike beacon: config extraction with 1768.py, C2 malleable profile decoding, sleep masking and process injection techniques.

title: BloodHound & SharpHound Notes
description: BloodHound quick reference: SharpHound collection methods, Cypher queries for attack paths, owned nodes and shortest paths to DA.

title: HTB GreenHorn — Easy Linux
description: HackTheBox GreenHorn writeup. Pluck CMS authenticated RCE, credential reuse across services and Depix tool to recover pixelated password.

title: Python Shodan Recon Tool
description: Python script wrapping the Shodan API for automated recon: open ports, CVEs, banners and geolocation data with CSV export.

title: EDR Evasion Techniques Overview
description: Overview of modern EDR evasion: userland unhooking, direct syscalls, PPID spoofing, ETW patching and AMSI bypass techniques.

title: Impacket Cheatsheet
description: Impacket toolkit quick reference: psexec, smbexec, wmiexec, secretsdump, GetUserSPNs and getTGT for Active Directory attacks.

title: HTB Mailing — Easy Windows
description: HackTheBox Mailing writeup. hMailServer path traversal for config leak, CVE-2024-21413 Outlook MonikerLink and WinRM with LibreOffice macro privesc.
